arts.ttl: Saliba CONTROVERSY in Arsenal loss, Man Utd PANICKED, Chelsea DISCOUNT
arts.sum: Saliba CONTROVERSY in Arsenal loss, Man Utd PANICKED, Chelsea DISCOUNT – FootballTransfers Recap Man Utd might have eased the pressure on Erik ten Hag as they overcame Brentford 2-1 at home, recovering from a 1-0 half-time deficit, but the long-term structural issues at Old Trafford persist.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola pays ultimate Sir Alex Ferguson compliment after Man Utd axe
arts.sum: Manchester United icon Sir Alex Ferguson has been let go from his £2million-a-year ambassadorial contract at Old Trafford and Pep Guardiola has come out in support

arts.ttl: Juventus confirm Paul Pogba transfer fate after ex-Man Utd star's public plea
arts.sum: Paul Pogba is set to return to the pitch after his ban for alleged doping was reduced by the CAS but it appears that the ex-Manchester United star will not be playing for Juventus

arts.ttl: Manchester United manager news: Red Devils reportedly enquire about potential Guardiola successor as Erik Ten Hag alternative
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly made contact with Ruben Amorim as they keep tabs on the Sporting Lisbon boss in case they decide to part company with Erik ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson would have approved after Man Utd youngsters inspire Brentford comeback
arts.sum: Former Manchester United manager Sir Alex Ferguson wasn't present to see his old club come from behind to deliver an important come-from-behind victory over Brentford

arts.ttl: We showed we are together - Man Utd boss Ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag believes the comeback victory against Brentford is proof of the "togetherness" in his squad.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer news: Red Devils continue to monitor left-back amidst Shaw, Malacia injury absences
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has said that Manchester United are continuing to monitor the progress of left-back Alvaro Fernandez as they reportedly weigh up whether to re-sign him.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 2-1 Brentford: Player ratings as Red Devils come from behind in impressive win
arts.sum: Garnacho stung Flekken's gloves midway through the first half as United grew into the game, while down the other end, Andre Onana had to make an excellent save to deny Christian Norgaard from range. DM: Casemiro - 7/10 - Lacked the energy to cope with Brentford's energetic press in the first half but looked far more useful after the break when United established their control.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag hints at using buy-back clause to sign ex-Man Utd defender
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has hinted that Manchester United are interested in utilising their buy-back clause to sign in-form full-back Alvaro Carreras from Benfica. Benfica exercised an option to sign Carreras on a permanent deal in May 2024, and since then he has developed into a key player for the Liga Portugal outfit.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson watches on as Aberdeen claim point at Celtic with spirited comeback
arts.sum: The point kept the Dons level with Celtic at the top of the Premiership
